message:
feat(show,sync): expand show command output, sync pipeline, and switch to local frankensqlite

Significant improvements to the show command, sync module, and dependency
management for tighter integration with the frankensqlite workspace.

Dependencies (Cargo.lock):
- Switch frankensqlite crates from git references to local path
  dependencies for faster iteration
- Add foldhash, lazy_static, lru, regex, smallvec, tracing-subscriber
  as transitive dependencies from fsqlite-core and fsqlite-btree

Show command (src/cli/commands/show.rs):
- +357 lines: expand issue display with richer formatting, dependency
  visualization, comment rendering, and metadata presentation

Sync module (src/sync/mod.rs):
- +294 lines: expand sync pipeline with improved JSONL import/export,
  conflict detection, and merge strategy refinements

Storage & main:
- sqlite.rs: +27 lines of storage layer improvements
- main.rs: +15 lines of entry point refinements

Tests:
- e2e_global_flags.rs: +77 lines of new E2E tests for global CLI flags
- repro_auto_flush_inefficiency.rs: +59 lines expanding auto-flush
  efficiency regression tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
